ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "japan_sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales in Japan */,
  "foreign_sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales in foreign markets */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_details" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales data record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_details_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "salesperson_name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Japan, Foreign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_region" (
  "sales_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales region record */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales data record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the region */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue from sales in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, salesperson) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
